commit_message: BAR-130: Skill-creator v4 conformance (fixes 1-2) + CLAUDE.md governing docs

changes.fix_1_layer0: Three Validators replaced with Five Elements (C&V, IMO, CTB, Hub-and-Spoke, Circle). Block 2 gate mechanism updated to validate all five.
changes.fix_2_compliance_gate: Block 1 third entry question added. Block 6 audit mechanism rule added mapping to OPERATOR_PROFILE.md Block 6.
changes.claude_md_locked_files: OPERATOR_PROFILE.md added as HUMAN AUTHORITY ONLY. SKILLS_SYSTEM.md and skill-creator added under Skills System Governance.

notes: Fix 3 (reformat 8 existing skills) is a separate follow-on task per packet instructions.
